feature: MillenniumIT P4b — Investigation + Market Replay + Fixed Income
requirement: Investigation case management, market replay, fixed income bonds with accrued interest

tasks.title: Investigation + market replay + fixed income types/stores/handlers/gateway
tasks.description:
Add investigation, market replay, and fixed income to securities-service.

APPEND to types.go:

- InvestigationCase struct: ID, AlertID, Status string (CASE_OPEN/CASE_INVESTIGATING/CASE_CLOSED), AssignedTo, Findings string, EvidenceIDs []string, TenantID, CreatedAt, ClosedAt — json tags
- ReplaySession struct: ID, InstrumentID, StartDate, EndDate, Status string (REPLAY_PENDING/REPLAY_RUNNING/REPLAY_COMPLETED), EventCount int, CreatedAt — json tags
- ReplayEvent struct: ID, SessionID, EventType string (ORDER_SUBMITTED/ORDER_CANCELLED/TRADE_EXECUTED), Timestamp, Data map[string]interface{} — json tags
- BondInstrument struct (extends Instrument): MaturityDate, CouponRate float64, CouponFrequency string (ANNUAL/SEMI_ANNUAL/QUARTERLY), ParValue float64, DayCountConvention string (ACT_360/ACT_365/THIRTY_360) — json tags
- AccruedInterestResult struct: InstrumentID, DaysAccrued int, AccruedAmount float64, DirtyPrice float64, CleanPrice float64 — json tags

APPEND to store.go:
- InvestigationStore: Create, Get, List(status, assignedTo string), Update(id string, fields map[string]interface{}), Close(id string, findings string) + InMemory
- ReplayStore: CreateSession, GetSession, ListSessions, AddEvent, GetEvents(sessionID string) + InMemory
- BondStore: Create, Get, List, InMemory (or extend InstrumentStore)

Create handlers:

1. handlers_investigation.go:
- POST /api/v1/securities/investigations — create from alert_id
- GET /api/v1/securities/investigations — list (?status=, ?assigned_to=)
- GET /api/v1/securities/investigations/{id}
- PATCH /api/v1/securities/investigations/{id} — update findings, assign
- POST /api/v1/securities/investigations/{id}/close — close with findings
- POST /api/v1/securities/investigations/{id}/evidence — add evidence_id

2. handlers_replay.go:
- POST /api/v1/securities/replay — create session {instrument_id, start_date, end_date}. Collect historical orders+trades from stores for that range, create ReplayEvents.
- GET /api/v1/securities/replay — list sessions
- GET /api/v1/securities/replay/{id}/events — get events for session

3. handlers_bond.go:
- POST /api/v1/securities/bonds — create bond instrument (validate: maturity_date, coupon_rate, par_value, day_count_convention)
- GET /api/v1/securities/bonds — list bond instruments
- GET /api/v1/securities/bonds/{id}/accrued-interest?settlement_date=2026-04-25 — calculate accrued interest
  - ACT/360: days * coupon_rate * par_value / 360
  - ACT/365: days * coupon_rate * par_value / 365
  - 30/360: (30-day months) * coupon_rate * par_value / 360

Update server.go + main.go + gateway routes.

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go build ./... && go test ./... && cd ../gateway && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T1.md

tasks.title: Unit tests for investigation, replay, fixed income
tasks.description:
Write tests.

1. store_test.go:
- TestInvestigationStore_Create_Get_List
- TestInvestigationStore_Close
- TestInvestigationStore_AddEvidence
- TestReplayStore_CreateSession_AddEvents_GetEvents
- TestBondStore_Create_List

2. handlers_investigation_test.go:
- TestCreateInvestigation → 201
- TestListInvestigations_FilterByStatus
- TestCloseInvestigation → 200
- TestAddEvidence → 200

3. handlers_replay_test.go:
- TestCreateReplaySession → 201
- TestGetReplayEvents

4. handlers_bond_test.go:
- TestCreateBond → 201
- TestListBonds
- TestAccruedInterest_ACT360 — verify calculation
- TestAccruedInterest_ACT365
- TestAccruedInterest_30_360

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go test ./... -race -cover

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T2.md
